What county is Norfolk, Va. A: Norfolk, Va. is not located in a county. Norfolk is an independent city; its city government is run by a city manager and a city council elected to represent the city's districts, rather than by a county government. Continue Reading. Credit: Matt Davis CC-BY-SA 2.0.
